message:
chore: Add ruff linter to development dependencies

- Add `ruff>=0.1.0` to `pyproject.toml` dependencies.
- Regenerate `uv.lock` to include ruff and its transitive dependencies.

Ruff will be used for fast, modern Python linting and code quality checks.

files.patch:
@@ -154,6 +154,7 @@ dependencies = [
     { name = "regex" },
     { name = "requests" },
     { name = "rich" },
+    { name = "ruff" },
     { name = "setuptools" },
     { name = "tensorboard" },
     { name = "tiktoken" },
@@ -205,6 +206,7 @@ requires-dist = [
     { name = "regex", specifier = ">=2025.9.1" },
     { name = "requests", specifier = ">=2.31.0" },
     { name = "rich", specifier = ">=13.7.0" },
+    { name = "ruff", specifier = ">=0.1.0" },
     { name = "scikit-learn", marker = "extra == 'viz'", specifier = ">=1.4.0" },
     { name = "setuptools", specifier = ">=80.9.0" },
     { name = "tensorboard", specifier = ">=2.16.0" },
@@ -1502,6 +1504,32 @@ wheels = [
     { url = "https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/25/7a/b0178788f8dc6cafce37a212c99565fa1fe7872c70c6c9c1e1a372d9d88f/rich-14.2.0-py3-none-any.whl", hash = "sha256:76bc51fe2e57d2b1be1f96c524b890b816e334ab4c1e45888799bfaab0021edd", size = 243393, upload-time = "2025-10-09T14:16:51.245Z" },
 ]
